ARTH498 Directed Studies in Art History | (2-3 Credits)

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art History & Archaeology department. Restriction: Junior standing or higher.

Repeatable to: 99 credits if content differs.

ARTH499 Honors Thesis (1-6 Credits)

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art History & Archaeology department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
